content:
Fashion Inspiration: Vintage Florals

I’ve been wearing my vintage florals and butterflies print earrings and bow a lot lately. The pattern is one I’ve always been drawn to. It makes me think of my Grandmother’s blue and white dishes, cute old things I’d find in her house, pearls, and nudes- as in the color- get your head out of the gutter! With all things vintage in mind (I really should have been born in a different era…), I came up with this dream outfit for this week’s fashion inspiration!

You can find all the above items at the below stores, including my adorable vintage patterned butterfly earrings! I already have and love the Essie nail polish (you’ve probably seen that very color in several of my nail art tutorials), and WISH that SOMEDAY I could afford those amazing Christian Louboutin Mary Janes! Sadly, they are equal in cost to my half of the rent, so that won’t be happening any time soon. Ah well! That’s why this is my “wish list,” right?

Vintage Floral Dress: ModCloth

Straw Hat: Old Navy

Christian Louboutin Mary Janes: Neiman Marcus

Quilted Clutch: Asos

Essie Nail Polish in Sand Tropez: Amazon

Pearl Bracelet: Nordstrom

Butterfly Fabric Button Earrings: Katie Crafts

Which item makes you swoon the most?
